class.name: FmodAudioStreamPlayer3DGizmoPlugin
class.brief_description: Editor gizmo plugin for visualizing FmodAudioStreamPlayer3D nodes in the 3D viewport.
class.description: FmodAudioStreamPlayer3DGizmoPlugin is an editor-only plugin that provides visual gizmos for [FmodAudioStreamPlayer3D] nodes in the 3D editor viewport. It displays visual indicators for the audio source's position, attenuation range, and emission cone. The gizmo helps designers visualize: - The position of 3D audio sources in the scene - The maximum distance/attenuation radius - The directional emission cone (when enabled) [b]Note:[/b] This is an editor-only class and is not available in exported projects. It is automatically registered when the plugin loads.
